category_sources: source_facts.description says "Dex to Java decompiler"; official GitHub README describes jadx CLI/GUI decompilation usage for APK, DEX, JAR and related Android formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jadx; official repository is titled skylot/jadx.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links to wiki pages for setup, library use, and GUI key bindings; README contains command-line usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/skylot/jadx, so repo was left null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Dex-to-Java decompilation; source_facts.executables lists jadx and jadx-gui; official README usage lists Android and Java input formats.
